marketSummary: As of 2026-04-15 11:25:55 CST, the A-Share market presents a mixed landscape. The SSE Composite showed marginal strength (+0.19%), while Shenzhen Component (-0.58%) and ChiNext (-0.67%) experienced corrections. Northbound capital activity remained muted for mainland stocks while Southbound capital flowed significantly into the Hang Seng Index, which outperformed with a 0.75% gain. The market lacks a strong singular sector catalyst, reflecting institutional hesitation amidst external macro variables. Data is derived from Yahoo Finance API. No major sector inflow data was provided, prompting a defensive, index-led market strategy.
